subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant whom Thou hast singled out for the Manifestation of Thine own Self, and hast kindled with the fire of Thy love, and hast caused to know Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی اختصصته لمظهر نفسک و اشتعلته بنار محبتک و عرفته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
